# AI SIGNALÂḞ

AI SIGNALÂḞ is an evidence-backed website audit for public AI discoverability and citation readiness.

## Canonical pages

- [Home and live audit](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/)
- [Methodology](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/methodology)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/faq)
- [About AI SIGNALÂḞ](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/about)
- [Privacy policy](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://signal-observatory.syedmubashirhaq.chatgpt.site/terms)

## Product boundaries

The live audit evaluates source HTML and public technical resources such as robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD and llms.txt. It reports citation-readiness signals and does not claim that an AI platform currently cites a submitted website.
